# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

add_subdirectory(proto)
add_subdirectory(unittests)
add_subdirectory(benchmarks)

add_library(library-cpp-misc)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-misc PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-misc PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  contrib-libs-eigen
  library-cpp-build_info
  cpp-yt-error
  cpp-yt-memory
  cpp-yt-misc
  yt-yt-client
  yt-yt-core
  cpp-misc-proto
  library-cpp-client
  yt-library-backtrace_introspector
)

target_sources(library-cpp-misc PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/backtrace_ypath_service.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/compact_unversioned_owning_row.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/counter.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/debug_build_warning.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/identifier.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/cow_tree.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/crash_recorder.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/indexed_yson_string.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/lexicographically_serialize.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/linear_system.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/load_throughput_throttler.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/mutable_unversioned_row.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/node_info.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/ordered_memory.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/reconfigurable.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/retryable_client_spec.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/retryable_client.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/retryable_transaction.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/status_profiler.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/version_helpers.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/weighted_random.cpp
)


add_global_library_for(library-cpp-misc.global
  library-cpp-misc)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-misc.global PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-misc.global PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  contrib-libs-eigen
  library-cpp-build_info
  cpp-yt-error
  cpp-yt-memory
  cpp-yt-misc
  yt-yt-client
  yt-yt-core
  cpp-misc-proto
  library-cpp-client
  yt-library-backtrace_introspector
)

target_sources(library-cpp-misc.global PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/misc/error_backtrace_enricher.cpp
)
